title: Joss Paper
description: Every [blue]5[/blue] times you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Cards exhausted via Ethereal effects count toward the threshold only at end of turn. When the threshold is met, cards are drawn and the counter resets.
